title: Runwal Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Runwal Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Runwal Group in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Runwal Group:
Runwal Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Runwal Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
